issues.description: Trigger should be a conditional effect responding to 'When a card is trashed from your hand by an effect', not OnPlay. Current trigger OnPlay is incorrect.
Missing condition to detect when a card is trashed from hand. Requires a Trigger or OnTrash-like condition to capture the trashing event.
Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' (card gains Rush 'during this turn'), not 'EndOfTurn'. The text 'during this turn' indicates the keyword lasts only for the current turn phase.
